series_metadata.series_title: PAYROLL WARRANT RECORDS AND PAYROLL DISBURSEMENT
series_metadata.series_description: PAYROLL DISBURSEMENT JOURNALS, WARRANT JOURNALS, MISCELLANEOUS DEDUCTIONS AND BOND DOCUMENTS.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until associated payroll records are audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies resolved., Paper: Recycle
